steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states Whiting reflects on the escape from everyday life—the decisive clue is the phrase ‘escape from everyday life’. Any correct answer must directly describe a feeling or experience of detachment from routine or duties.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice D uses ‘detachment from ordinary day and daylight duties that is exhilarating’, directly mirroring the escape from routine life. A, B, and C focus on logistical details, social charm, or opportunities rather than detachment from daily responsibilities. That matches choice D — D is correct.
